raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The state announced $650 million in emergency homelessness aid.",
    "Monies can be used with local discretion for projects like supportive services connecting homeless veterans to mental health, job, and community resources.",
    "One household in the Loma Linda Veterans Village received supportive housing services and secured a job closer to their family.",
    "$36 million of the $650 million will go to San Bernardino County.",
    "There is a dramatic influx of homeless individuals flooding cities and counties."
  ]
}
```
